initial_projection.best_clean_position: SAS ML if market offers near -145 or better

bets_logged.model_alignment: initial pregame sim had SAS winning outright at 61.3%

core_postmortem.headline: SAS ML thesis confirmed; pregame over thesis landed; halftime over add-on lost by hook at 214.
what_worked: Initial model correctly identified SAS as a live upset/win candidate despite market showing OKC favored.
Raw model total of 223.4 was too high, but directionally identified that 211.5 was low.
Market-tempo correction brought the total projection down to 215.0, nearly exact versus final total 214.
Pregame Over 211.5 -117 was the best calibrated total entry and closed as a winning bet.
what_failed_or_needs_patch: Halftime LiveFlow over projection was too aggressive after first-half scoring pace.
The total-market add-on at Over 214.5 was exposed to late-game stall and lost by 0.5 despite the pregame over winning.
When pregame over already holds position and halftime total reopens above recalibrated fair, LiveFlow should require a larger edge buffer.

actionable_patches.rule: In elimination Game 7 environments, cap halftime total add-ons when live total is 3+ points above pregame total unless live pace and foul environment both remain above threshold.
If pregame over is already held and live total moves upward, require at least +4.5 points of model edge and no late-clock compression flags before adding correlated over exposure.
Avoid adding over positions at x.5 totals when projected median is less than 6 points above market in playoff elimination settings.

series_roll_forward_notes.SAS_profile: Validated as resilient underdog with enough creation diversity to survive OKC pressure.
series_roll_forward_notes.OKC_profile: Without Jalen Williams and Ajay Mitchell, OKC creation depth remained fragile; SGA pressure was real but not enough to fully stabilize the offense late.
series_roll_forward_notes.future_model_weighting: Prioritize injury-adjusted creation depth and playoff possession compression over raw first-half pace for late LiveFlow totals.
